name: UwsSubjAreaBalSumLoad_EE

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH InputData AS (SELECT BAL_DT, ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD, COUNT(*) OVER () AS ROW_COUNT, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY BAL_DT ASC) AS rownum FROM UWS.TBL_BAL_SUM WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.Target}' AND SUBJ_AREA_NM = '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}'), Rcte AS (SELECT rownum, CAST(0 AS INT) AS svPrevCount, CAST(1 AS INT) AS svCurrCount, '' AS svTempTlrncCd, '' AS svTempRslvIn, '' AS svTempRslvIncd, InputData.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD AS svCurrTlrncCd, BAL_DT, ROW_COUNT FROM InputData WHERE rownum = 1 UNION ALL SELECT i.rownum, rc.svCurrCount AS svPrevCount, rc.svCurrCount + 1 AS svCurrCount, CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), i.BAL_DT, 120), 1, 10) <> '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' THEN 'NEXT ROW' WHEN rc.svCurrTlrncCd = 'BAL' AND rc.svTempTlrncCd <> 'OUT' AND rc.svTempTlrncCd <> 'IN' THEN 'BAL' WHEN rc.svCurrTlrncCd = 'BAL' AND rc.svTempTlrncCd = 'IN' THEN 'IN' WHEN rc.svCurrTlrncCd = 'IN' AND rc.svTempTlrncCd <> 'OUT' THEN 'IN' ELSE 'OUT' END AS svTempTlrncCd, CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), i.BAL_DT, 120), 1, 10) = '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' THEN 'Y' WHEN rc.svCurrTlrncCd = 'BAL' AND rc.svTempRslvIncd <> 'OUT' THEN 'Y' WHEN rc.svCurrTlrncCd = 'IN' AND rc.svTempRslvIncd <> 'OUT' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS svTempRslvIn, CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), i.BAL_DT, 120), 1, 10) = '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' THEN 'NA' WHEN rc.svCurrTlrncCd = 'BAL' AND rc.svTempRslvIncd <> 'OUT' AND rc.svTempRslvIncd <> 'IN' THEN 'BAL' WHEN rc.svCurrTlrncCd = 'BAL' AND rc.svTempRslvIncd = 'IN' THEN 'IN' WHEN rc.svCurrTlrncCd = 'IN' AND rc.svTempRslvIncd <> 'OUT' THEN 'IN' ELSE 'OUT' END AS svTempRslvIncd, i.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD AS svCurrTlrncCd, i.BAL_DT, i.ROW_COUNT FROM Rcte rc JOIN InputData i ON i.rownum = rc.rownum + 1) SELECT '@{pipeline().parameters.Target}' AS TRGT_SYS_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}' AS SUBJ_AREA_NM, CAST('@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' AS DATETIME) AS LAST_BAL_DT, rc.svTempTlrncCd AS TLRNC_CD, rc.svTempRslvIn AS PREV_ISSUE_CRCTD_IN, @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle} AS TRGT_RUN_CYC_NO, CAST('@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' AS DATETIME) AS CRT_DTM, CAST('@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' AS DATETIME) AS LAST_UPDT_DTM, '@{pipeline().parameters.UWSAcct}' AS USER_ID FROM Rcte rc WHERE rc.rownum = rc.ROW_COUNT

Description:

CALLED BY:   Multiple balacning process can use this job

PROCESSING:
                  
                The Job loads the SUBJECT_AREA_BAL_SUM table after the balancing control job is done for a given Subject Area
